「출입국관리법 시행령」 제88조의8제2항에 따라 위와 같이 신청합니다.
 I hereby submit an application for extension of the validity of refugee travel document 
as detailed above in accordance with paragraph 2, Article 88-8 of Enforcement 
Decree of the Immigration Act.
